changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_option_set_slm ON analytics.dim_option_set (source_last_modified_at);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_option_set_slm;

changeSet.author: hamza
